title: 1 Thessalonians 1.6 is an earliest example that "word" and "spirit" are titular synonyms (circa synagogue targums) for the Lord / Master Yeshua
author: joshualinog
tags: Ontological Mereology of GOD | Nature of GOD
labels: Ontological Mereology of GOD | Nature of GOD
excerpt: 1 # 1 Thessalonians 1.6 is an earliest example that "word" and "spirit" are titular synonyms (circa synagogue targums) for the Lord / Master Yeshua
body:
1
# 1 Thessalonians 1.6 is an earliest example that "word" and "spirit" are titular synonyms (circa synagogue targums) for the Lord / Master Yeshua

 Thessalonians 1:6
SBLGNT καὶ ὑμεῖς μιμηταὶ ἡμῶν ἐγενήθητε καὶ τοῦ κυρίου, δεξάμενοι τὸν λόγον ἐν θλίψει πολλῇ μετὰ χαρᾶς πνεύματος ἁγίου,
YLT and ye--ye did become imitators of us, and of the Lord, having received the word in much tribulation, with joy of the Holy Spirit,
LEB And you became imitators of us and of the Lord, receiving the word in much affliction, with the joy of the Holy Spirit,
